note: B-10 Dependabot 6 vulnerabilities 升级成果（feature/v21-b10-deps）— 按用户拍板策略 A 仅升级高危 CVE ≥ 7（最小爆炸半径）

advisories.title: undici vulnerable to TLS certificate validation bypass via dropped requestTls in SOCKS5 ProxyAgent
undici vulnerable to cross-user information disclosure via shared cache whitespace bypass
undici vulnerable to HTTP header injection via Set-Cookie percent-decoding
undici WebSocket client vulnerable to denial of service via fragment count bypass
undici vulnerable to cross-origin request routing via SOCKS5 proxy pool reuse
undici vulnerable to HTTP response queue poisoning via keep-alive socket reuse
undici vulnerable to Set-Cookie SameSite attribute downgrade via permissive substring matching

pre_upgrade.note_high_count: 用户报告 2 high 但 npm audit 列出 3 个 high GHSA（GHSA-vmh5-mc38-953g 7.4 / GHSA-vxpw-j846-p89q 7.5 / GHSA-hm92-r4w5-c3mj 7.5）— 可能 GitHub Dependabot web UI 折叠同包漏洞。所有 3 个 high 均通过 undici 单一升级到 7.28+ 修复

remediation.strategy: A — 仅高危 CVE ≥ 7（用户拍板，最小爆炸半径）
remediation.why_overrides: undici 是 jsdom@29.1.1 (devDependency, ~29.1.1) 的 transitive dep；jsdom 29.x 最新 29.1.1 仍声明 undici@^7.25.0。npm overrides 强制整树使用 undici >= 7.28.0，不修改 jsdom 限定符（保持 §11 地基红线 #10 devDependencies ~ 限定）
remediation.version_bump: undici 7.26.0 → 7.28.0（minor + patch，仅安全修复；无 major / breaking）
